title: symethus siculus
side_effects: Symethus siculus can have side effects if used improperly, such as dizziness, nausea, and allergic reactions in some individuals. Prolonged use or excessive consumption can lead to more severe complications, including headaches, stomach ulcers, and even cardiovascular issues. Additionally, improper preparation or handling of the plant can cause skin irritation, respiratory problems, and gastrointestinal issues. In severe cases, misuse of Symethus siculus can result in organ damage or even death.
